title: Important Update on AVEC’s Mail In Election
summary: The results of Alaska Village Electric Cooperative’s mail-in vote have been announced. The membership has re-elected the three incumbent board members, Phyllis Clough, Peter Demoski, and Helena Jones to another three year term. title: 2020 Top 10 Power Plant Operators of the Year
summary: With more than 100 AVEC plant operators, choosing the Top 10 each year is a difficult task. AVEC plant operators work under a variety of challenging conditions year-round, but the top operators make an extra effort to ensure the plant stays operational and provides light and heat for their families...

title: Growing while it’s snowing
summary: Greenhouse Coordinator Jeff Swan tends to the plants in the Tribe’s Ch’k’denłyah yuyeh greenhouse. While the snow has been piling up this winter, the Tribe’s greenhouse has been piling up the produce. title: Farewell to Victoria Hofmann!
